evidence_excerpt: The patient remains disease-free at 7 years postoperatively, and SIADH resolved with sodium returning to normal after tumour removal. No postoperative morbidity was reported.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: SIADH resolved after tumour resection with normalization of sodium, and the patient remains disease-free at 7 years with no reported ongoing symptoms.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: The patient’s serum sodium level returned to normal after removal of the tumour; SIADH was considered resolved.
The patient remains disease-free at 7 years postoperatively.
No postoperative morbidity, such as hypoglobus, has been experienced; no facial paresthesia, indicating maintained normal function over time.

notes_on_uncertainty: The index time is approximated to the biopsy-confirmed diagnosis and MDT treatment plan. Precise dates are not provided. Timing of adjuvant radiotherapy is not specified; events are limited to clearly documented outcomes. Functional status is inferred conservatively from clinician-reported absence of morbidity and long-term disease-free status.
